```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
##############################################################################
# Packages
library(exams)
library(tidyverse)
library(questR)


##############################################################################
# Initialization
question_id <- "EN00000XXX"
wdir <- getwd()
parameters <- teachR::param_quest(wdir, question_id, alttype = "mcq", altlevel = "3 Apply")
for (i in 1:length(parameters)) assign(names(parameters)[[i]], parameters[[i]])
options(xtable.comment = FALSE, xtable.floating = FALSE, xtable.timestamp = "")
set.seed(seed)


##############################################################################
# Preparation



#selection <- questR::openquest %>%
#  dplyr::filter(subject == "Management Control", subsection == "", bloom == "")  %>%
#  dplyr::sample_n(1)

#quest <- selection$question[[1]]
#sol <- selection$answer[[1]]
#keys <- selection$keys[[1]]
#inst <- unlist(strsplit(selection$instructions[[1]], "; "))
#words <- selection$words[[1]]
#ref <- selection$references[[1]]
#instructions <- dplyr::case_when(
#  !is.na(inst) & !is.na(ref) ~ paste0(inst, ", remain within ", words, " words and build on the folowing references:"),
#  !is.na(inst) & is.na(ref) ~ paste0(inst, " and remain within ", words, " words."),
#  is.na(inst) & !is.na(ref) ~ paste0("remain within ", words, " words and build on the folowing references:"),
#  TRUE ~ paste0("remain within ", words, " words.")
#)


##############################################################################
# Answers

#if (extype == "string" & exasolu == "exam" & type_table != "html") lines <- paste0("\\vspace{",selection$space[[1]],"cm}") else lines <- rep(" \\ ", 2)
lines <- rep("\\ ", 2)

questions <- c(
  right1 = "right",
  wrong1 = "wrong",
  wrong2 = "wrong",
  wrong3 = "wrong",
  wrong4 = "wrong"
)

solutions <- c(TRUE,FALSE,FALSE,FALSE,FALSE)

explanations <- c(
  "",
  "",
  "",
  "",
  ""
)


##############################################################################
# Randomize order (do not edit)
alea <- sample(c(1, sample(2:length(questions), (alternatives-1))), alternatives)
questions <- questions[alea]
solutions <- solutions[alea]
explanations <- explanations[alea]
```



Question
========
`r txt_question_id` What is the question? `r points`  
\
*Your answer should `r instructions`*  
`r ref`  
\

```{r questionlist, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
if (extype == "schoice") exams::answerlist(questions, markup = "markdown") else writeLines(lines)
```



Solution
========
Describe is the solution.

```{r solutionlist, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
if (extype == "schoice") exams::answerlist(ifelse(solutions, "True", "False"), explanations, markup = "markdown") else writeLines(c("\\ ","\\ ")) # else writeLines(keys)
```



Meta-information
================
extype: `r extype`
exsolution: `r exams::mchoice2string(solutions, single = TRUE)`
exname: `r question_id`
